descriptions.client: TechEmpower load generator, swept toward saturation (measured 20-query operating point = 5,900 req/s).
descriptions.svc: The web framework under test — same CPU station as the single-query model (28 cores / 0.2692 ms => ~104,000 req/s). At 20 queries per request the DB saturates at 5,900 req/s, far below the framework CPU, so this workload stays DB-bound (the framework CPU is present but not the bottleneck here).
descriptions.db: One PostgreSQL server, SAME tier as the single-query model (capacity = 118,000 queries/s). The ratio(20) transform on the svc->db edge means each request fans out to 20 DB queries, so the DB saturates at 118,000 / 20 = 5,900 req/s — the request ceiling divided by the query fan-out. This 20x relationship is SDA's structural prediction.
